and then we saw some restaurant with a lot of random figurines and shit behind a big window
then we decided to enter the restaurant
and there were a lot of plushes and stuff hanging on the wall, but they were all bootlegs
there was some booth that sold fake fumos and there was a real marisa one on sale that you had to get from some contest or something like that
and then we decided to sit down and some guy served us fries without telling us beforehand what we wanted, and there was some hole in the table with a tomato slice in it
it looked like the restaurant was in a poor condition since it looked so unclean
and then i decided to look around the restaurant while i was waiting for the food
and there were more glass windows with random shit and then i stepped outside and saw a huge aquarium thing? it was empty
then i went back inside and washed my face and hands and there was some little boy behind me about to do the same thing right before i went back
and then some person told us they were waiting for their fries because they were on my table
and the fries were like burned
